reasoning_model_1: The model generates the text 'I believe I can handle this job, I will give my best' accurately with no content errors. Regarding the core paralinguistic feature (Cognitive State: Confident), the speaker adopts a calm, steady, and assured tone. Specifically, the delivery of 'I will give my best' (0:02-0:04) uses a firm downward inflection that conveys certainty and professionalism. The pacing is deliberate, reinforcing the sense of confidence. The model successfully captures the required cognitive state.
reasoning_model_2: The model generates the correct text content. However, the audio quality is noticeably lower fidelity and sounds slightly muffled compared to human speech standards. model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. It successfully executes the command by delivering the line with a steady, professional, and assured tone that matches the requested 'confident' cognitive state. The audio is also crisp and high-fidelity. Model 2, in contrast, delivers the line with a timid and nervous tone, effectively conveying the opposite of the requested emotion. Additionally, Model 2's audio quality is inferior (muffled) compared to Model 1. Model 1 satisfies all criteria, while Model 2 fails the core paralinguistic requirement.
